concept: Range budget (fraction of expected range consumed by 15:55)

concept: Parkinson vol RATIO (closing vs full-day) as relative calm metric
notes: Fixes the flaw in raw Parkinson (which failed): relative vol is what matters.

concept: VIX9D/VIX as continuous sizing multiplier (not binary filter)
notes: Addresses the trade-off that killed binary term structure filter.

concept: ORB containment at 14:00 = range-bound day = highest MEIC WR
notes: ORB validated for Zenith. MEIC is the next priority.

concept: Dual ORB: morning + lunch range. Nested = contracting = safe
notes: Novel extension of ORB concept.

concept: Dual %R fast+slow for call/put side selection

concept: Contango + ORB width < 20 combo = two validated signals stacked
notes: Both individually validated. Test combo.

concept: Calm streak (days since VIX cross) as VIX/16 multiplier tightener

concept: Prior-day candle direction as MEIC side selector
notes: One line of code. Zero parameters. Test immediately.

concept: KNN confidence (vote split) inverted: low confidence = ambiguous = safe
notes: Novel: INVERT the ML signal for credit spreads.

concept: Ehlers cycle peak timing for Zenith entries
notes: Most novel concept in entire project.

concept: Morning/evening star at 15:54 for side selection

concept: Premium/discount zone (above/below 50% of day range) for side selection

concept: VIX bar compression at 15:50 (proxy for institutional calm)

concept: Post-sweep day detection = calmer = higher WR for credit spreads
notes: Sweep + reversal = institutional stop hunt complete.

concept: Monte Carlo confidence intervals for VIX/16 hybrid variant
notes: Statistical validation of our best finding.

concept: Fractal efficiency < 0.5 at 15:50 = mean-reverting close = safest

concept: ER as MEIC direction signal (not filter) at 14:00
notes: ER failed as LastFive filter but may work as MEIC direction signal.

concept: Morning WVF + afternoon recovery = best MEIC setup
